subject: FW: The Little Rascals - Whatever Happened to ...a must look....
body:
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Monday, May 19, 2008 2:01 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fw: The Little Rascals - Whatever Happened to ...a must look....

 

 

----- Original Message -----
From: Reifler Brad NYC <BReifler@palicapital.com>
To: r.beyer@tcw.com <r.beyer@tcw.com>
Sent: Mon May 19 13:55:50 2008
Subject: FW: The Little Rascals - Whatever Happened to ...a must look....



-

Subject: Fwd: The Little Rascals - Whatever Happened to ...



                                                                                 These pictures are great
                                        <<TheLittl.jpg>> 
                                       
                                       
                                        What ever happened to those people?
                                       
                                        In <<file000.jpg>> case you forgot who is who.
                                       
                                        Well, here it is...
<<file001.jpg>> 
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                        The Our Gang Curse
                                       
                                        Alfalfa --
                                       
                                        Carl Switzer was shot to death at age <<file002.jpg>> 31.
                                       
                                <<file003.jpg>>       
                                       
                                        Chubby --
                                       
                                        300-pound Norman Chaney died at age 22 following an operation.
                                       
<<file004.jpg>> 
                                       
                                       
                                        Buckwheat --
                                       
                                        William Thomas died at age 49 of a heart attack.
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                        Darla Hood <<file005.jpg>> --
                                       
                                        The Our Gang leading lady contracted hepatitis and died at age 47.
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                        Brisbane  <<file006.jpg>> -- 
                                       
                                        Kendall McCormas, known as Breezy Brisbane, committed suicide at age 64.
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                        Froggy -- Will <<file007.jpg>> iam Robert Laughline was killed in a motor scooter accident at age 16.
                                       
                                       
                                        Mickey Daniels --
                                       
                                        He died of liver disease at 55.
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                        Stymie --
                                       
                                        Mathew Bear led a life of crime and drugs. He died of <<file008.jpg>> a stroke at age 56.
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                        Scotty Beckett --
                                       
                                        He died at age 38 foll <<file009.jpg>> owing a brutal beating.
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                        Wheezer --
                                       
                                        Robert Hutchins was killed in an airplane accident at age 19.
                                       
                                <<file010.jpg>>       
                                       
                                        Pete the Pup --
                                       
                                        He was poisoned by an unknown assailant.
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                        Bu <<file011.jpg>> tch --
                                       
                                        Currently lives in California
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                       
                                        AndSpanky...
                                       
                                        Robert Blake was <<file012.jpg>> accused of murder <<file013.jpg>> ing his wife.
                                       
                                        I did not know that was Robert Blake!
                                       
                                        Did any of you? Wow.
                                       
<<file014.jpg>>                                        'Please share with all your 'old' friends, I am sure they will like this

                                        

                                               
                                                                               
                                <<file015.jpg>>        

                                                

<<file016.jpg>>                                               
                                                                                ________________________________

                                       
                                        No virus found in this incoming message.
                                        Checked by AVG.
                                        Version: 7.5.519 / Virus Database: 269.22.1/1352 - Release Date: 3/31/2008 10:13 AM

                               
                                Going green? See the top 12 foods to eat organic. <http://green.msn.com/galleries/photos/photos.aspx?gid=164&ocid=T003MSN51N1653A> 

                

               
                __________________________________________________
                Do You Yahoo!?
                Tired of spam? Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around
                http://mail.yahoo.com <http://mail.yahoo.com/>
